scripts.deploy:firebase: node scripts/validate-static.mjs && node scripts/smoke-app.mjs && node scripts/validate-vault.mjs && node scripts/validate-workdb.mjs && node scripts/build-pages.mjs && firebase deploy --project llm-knowledge-bases --only hosting,firestore:rules
